usage: setPtnPinStatus [-help] [-selectedPinStatus {fixed placed cover}] { -pin {pinName | pinNameList} } { -status {fixed placed unplaced cover} } { [-pin {pinName | pinNameList} -status {fixed placed unplaced cover} [-cell <partitionName>]] }

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies name of the partition, wildcard can be specified

options.name: -pin
options.description: Specifies name of the partition pins, wildcard can be specified

options.name: -selectedPinStatus
options.description: Select pin with only specified status

options.name: -status
options.description: Specifies new status of the pin
